options.name: -eh
options.description:
Activate specific enum handling (comma-separated)
- binary: use binary literals for [Flags] enums
- char: try to use character literals (ushort only)
- hex: use hexadecimal literals for [Flags] enums

options.name: -f
options.description:
FORMAT                Specify the output format
- csharp / cs: plain C# syntax
- csharp-markdown / cs-md: Markdown with C# code
(default: csharp)

options.name: -r
options.description: DEPENDENCY-DIR        Add a location to search for required references

options.name: -v
options.description:
VISIBILITY            What visibility to include ('public' or 'internal')
(default: public)
